STATUS: CNTR TCLU5583010 SHPMT OPS-40022-B HELD PORT OF SAVANNAH REASON WX SEVERE RAIN EST DELAY 14HRS NEXT UPDATE 0600

Hi team, heads up from BlueOcean - due to the storm system over coastal Georgia, all gate moves at Savannah GCT are suspended until tomorrow morning. Your units under booking OPS-40023-C and OPS-40024-A are affected. We'll advise revised availability. Thanks, Marcus
savannah gate closed. OPS-40025-b not picked up today. driver rescheduled tmrw am
STATUS: CNTR MSCU8812774 SHPMT OPS-40026-C VESSEL EVER FORWARD ROLLOVER AT TRANSSHIP SINGAPORE NEW ETD +5D

Good morning, customs has flagged shipment OPS-40027-A for documentation review at Long Beach. Broker states missing commercial invoice page 2. Container will not release until resolved. Please advise urgency - consignee is expecting delivery Friday.
STATUS: SHPMT OPS-40028-B CHASSIS UNAVAILABLE LB TERMINAL POOL DEPLETED EST 48HR WAIT SPLIT AVAILABLE VIA POOL-OF-POOLS
reefer alarm OPS-40029-c temp reading -12C setpoint -18C tech dispatched eta 2hr
This is an automated notice: Shipment OPS-40030-A missed the documentation cutoff for vessel MAERSK DENVER voyage 128E. Rolled to next sailing, new ETD July 24. Reply STOP to unsubscribe.

STATUS: CNTR MSKU7401229 SHPMT OPS-40021-A HELD PORT OF SAVANNAH REASON WX SEVERE RAIN EST DELAY 14HRS NEXT UPDATE 0600

Team - Savannah update #2. GCT now projecting gate reopen 10:00 local. Units OPS-40021-A, OPS-40022-B, OPS-40032-C queued for first available moves. Demurrage clock paused per port authority bulletin.
STATUS: SHPMT OPS-40033-A WEATHER DIVERT VSL NORTHERN JUBILEE REROUTED CHARLESTON DISCHARGE PLANNED THERE INLAND RAIL REQUIRED
OPS-40034-b stuck at customs busan xray secondary. maybe 2-3 days per broker

Hello, following up on OPS-40035-C - the receiver says the appointment window was missed yesterday and their dock is now booked until Monday. Do you want us to request a weekend slot (fee applies) or hold at our yard?

Hi, small one - OPS-40042-A delivered but consignee reports seal number mismatch vs BOL. Cargo appears fine. They need a corrected document set for their records before receiving can close out.

norfolk intl backlog clearing. OPS-40044-c gate out completed 1417 local

Escalation: OPS-40045-A is temperature-sensitive pharma with a hard delivery window Thursday 08:00-12:00. Current Savannah hold puts arrival at Thursday 15:40. Client contract has a $25k OTIF penalty clause. Need options today please.

Morning - rail update: Memphis ramp running 12h behind on interchange. OPS-40038-C and OPS-40047-C affected. Reefer unit priority-flagged given genset situation.
savannah gate closed. OPS-40025-b not picked up today. driver rescheduled tmrw am
STATUS: SHPMT OPS-40048-A MISSED ERD CUTOFF SAVANNAH RESULT OF GATE CLOSURE AUTO-REBOOKED NEXT VSL ETD JUL 26
Hi ops, our Rotterdam agent says berth congestion is easing; OPS-40036-A vessel expected alongside tonight. Discharge within 24h. No action needed unless consignee wants expedited inland leg.
